metadata.scheme_name: Award of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B.Tech 3rd/4th Year)

raw_data.details: The “Award of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B. Tech 3rd/4th Year)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to support meritorious students pursuing B. Tech in Agricultural Engineering in their 3rd and 4th years by providing a one-year scholarship.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a student. The applicant must be enrolled in the 3rd or 4th year of the B. Tech (Agricultural Engineering) course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the students receive their payments.
raw_data.documents_required: Documents are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme.

To know more please visit Check EligibilityUttarakhandAward of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B. Tech 3rd/4th Year)Agricultural EngineeringMeritScholarshipStudentDetailsThe “Award of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B. Tech 3rd/4th Year)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to support meritorious students pursuing B. Tech in Agricultural Engineering in their 3rd and 4th years by providing a one-year scholarship. BenefitsRate of Scholarship: ₹2,000 per month. EligibilityThe applicant must be a student. The applicant must be enrolled in the 3rd or 4th year of the B. Tech (Agricultural Engineering) course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only. Application ProcessOfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the students receive their payments. Documents RequiredDocuments are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme. Frequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible for this scholarship? Students enrolled in the 3rd or 4th year of the B. Tech in Agricultural Engineering program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. What is the duration of the scholarship? The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year. How much financial assistance does the scholarship provide? The scholarship provides ₹2,000 per month for one year. How can students apply for this scholarship? Students must submit their applications using the prescribed form issued by the university. Who evaluates the applications? A committee constituted by the Vice Chancellor reviews and evaluates all submitted applications following a defined procedure. How is the final approval given? Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval for the scholarship. When do students receive the scholarship payment? Students receive the scholarship payment after the Vice Chancellor’s approval. Sources And References[Guidelines (Page No. 184)](https://uk.gov.in/department92/library_file/file-30-01-2025-04-25-16.pdf)OkWas this helpful?
raw_data.scheme_name: Award of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B.Tech 3rd/4th Year)

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scholarship?
faqs.answer: Students enrolled in the 3rd or 4th year of the B. Tech in Agricultural Engineering program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.

faqs.question: What is the duration of the scholarship?
faqs.answer: The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance does the scholarship provide?
faqs.answer: The scholarship provides ₹2,000 per month for one year.

faqs.question: How can students apply for this scholarship?
faqs.answer: Students must submit their applications using the prescribed form issued by the university.

faqs.question: Who evaluates the applications?
faqs.answer: A committee constituted by the Vice Chancellor reviews and evaluates all submitted applications following a defined procedure.

faqs.question: How is the final approval given?
faqs.answer: Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval for the scholarship.

faqs.question: When do students receive the scholarship payment?
faqs.answer: Students receive the scholarship payment after the Vice Chancellor’s approval.
